localized_texts.text: Sunway Lagoon Theme Park

Experience never-ending fun at the award-winning water park in Malaysia — Sunway Lagoon! Explore six adventure zones within the park featuring thrilling rides and attractions. Come to the Amusement Park for cowboy rollercoaster action or view the world upside down at the 360-degree pirate ship. Get soaking wet at the Sunway Lagoon's Water Park, where you can surf giant waves at Surf Beach or slide down the vuvuzela, the world's highest and largest water ride. Set foot in Asia's first Nickelodeon-themed park, Nickelodeon Lost Lagoon, and go on splashy adventures with your favorite characters.
Multi-Park Extravaganza: Sunway Lagoon is a multi-park extravaganza, with 80 attractions spread over 360,000 square meters.
Exciting Rides: There are plenty of fun rides that cater to both children and adults.
Bungee Jumping: Sunway Lagoon offers thrilling facilities like the chance to go bungee jumping.
Kayaking and Archery: You can also learn archery or go kayaking at Sunway Lagoon.
Flying Fox: Experience the thrill of the Flying Fox at Sunway Lagoon.

Get ready for an action-packed day at Sunway Lagoon with something for everyone. Enjoy thrilling rides at the Amusement Park, cool off at the Water Park with high-speed slides and wave pools, and get close to over 150 animal species at the Wildlife Park. Brave the spine-chilling Scream Park, splash into Asia’s first Nickelodeon-themed land, and fuel your adrenaline at X Park with extreme activities like Flying Fox, bungee jumping, go-karting, and ATV rides.
Restrictions: Please also kindly visit Sunway Lagoon Theme Park official website for height requirements for the rides.
Dresscode: Appropriate swimwear is encouraged at the park at all times for safety and hygiene purposes.
Wheelchairs are available inside the park.
What’s included: Admission to Sunway Lagoon Theme Park (Water Park, Amusement Park, Wildlife Park, Extreme Park, Scream Park & Nickelodeon Lost Lagoon)
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Please present printed voucher along with your passport/ID at the counter for redemption.

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket valid on visit date Non-Malaysian is for International / Passport holders. Re-entry to the park is not allowed. Wristband tags will be removed upon exit. Wristband tags are valid for entry only on the date of visit. Eligibility Child Rate: Ages 12 years old and below or Senior aged 60 years old and above. Child rate applies to children above 90 cm in height or aged 12 years old and below (based on year of birth). Child rate is based on height (90 cm and above) and not by age 4 years old. Free Admission: Children below 90 cm in height. Children under 12 years old must be accompanied by an adult. All ages are determined based on year of birth. Attraction Access IC and Passport authentication is required at the ticketing counter. Ticket confirmation applies for Adult, Child, and Senior guests. The cashier reserves the right to reject redemption if the information provided is unclear or does not match. If the ticket name differs from the IC/Passport, the venue reserves the right to refuse admission without refund. Additional Information Penalty Fees: Upgrade MyKad Child to MyKad Adult: RM 50 per person Upgrade MyKad to Non-MyKad: RM 100 per person All transactions in the park are via cash or E-load. E-load can be topped up at the Ticketing Counter. Unused E-load balance can be refunded on the same day before 7 PM at the Ticketing Counter. When using waterslides, the following are not permitted: jewelry, T-shirts or swimwear with metal decorations, cut-off jeans, and glasses. Slides are used at guests’ own risk. Sunway Lagoon encourages guests to secure valuables. The park is not responsible for lost or stolen items. Guests are responsible for their own belongings. Dangerous items such as bottles, firecrackers, lasers, and other items that may disturb other guests are prohibited inside the venue. Important Notes Sunway Lagoon reserves the right to carry out renovations or upgrading works when necessary. Management reserves the right to change operating hours, close the park, rides, or attractions due to maintenance, weather, special events, or unforeseen circumstances without prior notice. Insurance coverage is applicable (terms and conditions apply). General Park Rules of Sunway Lagoon apply, refer to "http://sunwaylagoon.com/park-rules"
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation if cancelled till the selected date.

What’s included: Admission to Quack Express Pass

Terms & Conditions: Admission Ticket is valid on the selected visit date. Available for International guests. 5% entertainment tax is not applicable to this ticket. Quack Xpress is valid only on the date of entry. Quack Xpress is non-transferable and valid only for the purchaser.Eligibility IC and Passport authentication is required at the ticketing counter. Ticket confirmation applies for Adult, Child, and Senior guests. The cashier reserves the right to reject redemption if the information provided is unclear or does not match. If the ticket name differs from the IC/Passport, the venue reserves the right to refuse admission without refund.Attraction Access Quack Xpress holders are entitled to priority access to up to 20 selected rides and attractions. Access to certain rides and attractions may vary depending on seating capacity and time limitations. Some rides and attractions may have different age, height, or usage restrictions. Guests must comply with all applicable rules.Additional Information There is a limited number of Quack Xpress passes available daily, and sales may be suspended without prior notice. Dangerous materials and items such as bottles, firecrackers, lasers, and other items that may disturb other guests are prohibited inside the venue.Important Notes Sunway Lagoon Malaysia Management reserves the right to amend the Terms and Conditions or terminate Quack Xpress without prior notice. Management reserves the right to close any rides or attractions for maintenance or other reasons without prior notice. In the event of disputes, the decision of Sunway Lagoon Malaysia shall be final. Information is subject to change without prior notice. General Park Rules of Sunway Lagoon apply, refer to "http://sunwaylagoon.com/park-rules"
